arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal face new rival for Wolverhampton Wanderers’ star Matheus Cunha
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers’ Matheus Cunha is set to become one of the most talked-about names in the upcoming summer transfer window. The 24-year-old has impressed in the Premier League, attracting the attention of several top clubs eager to secure his services. arts.ttl: 'Contacts already': £70m star expected to move to the PL this summer with Liverpool and Arsenal keen - Romano
Mikel Arteta opens up on Bukayo Saka’s chances of playing against Fulham Saturday
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta, speaking ahead of the Premier League game against Fulham tomorrow, has delivered a positive update on star player Bukayo Saka. Mikel Arteta’s Arsenal side are currently second in the Premier League, though they trail leaders Liverpool by 12 points. arts.ttl: Arsenal Star Out for 'Weeks' as Arteta Confirms Injury Blow
arts.sum: Arsenal have struggled with injuries in recent weeks and their expanding list of sidelined stars has increased

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres: Arsenal step up pursuit of Man Utd target after sporting director arrival
arts.sum: Arsenal have been described as "developing a strong interest" in Sporting CP striker Viktor Gyokeres as the summer transfer window edges closer.

arts.ttl: Saka 'ready to go' for Arsenal against Fulham
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has confirmed that Bukayo Saka is "ready to go" as his side prepare to face Fulham in the Premier League on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Man City hijack Real Madrid bid for ‘Bellingham of defenders’ after Alexander-Arnold warning

arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka set to make Arsenal return after long injury lay-off
arts.sum: Saka has not featured since December after hamstring surgery

arts.ttl: Arteta confirms huge Arsenal injury boost ahead of Fulham
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has confirmed that Bukayo Saka is ‘ready to go’ ahead of Arsenal’s clash with Fulham tomorrow. Saka has been sidelined since sustaining a hamstring injury during the win at Crystal Palace on December 21st. arts.ttl: Andrea Berta on collision course with Diego Simeone over latest Arsenal transfer decision
arts.sum: The report claimed that Berta himself is an admirer of Gyokeres, with the striker apparently set to be a part of Arsenal's transfer plans going forward. Berta had previously worked at Atletico Madrid before making the switch to Arsenal, and will now be in charge of leading the club's transfer plans going forward.
